title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates:
Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers Asia Pacific Associates!
